THE LORE (IT'S REAL UNDERNEATH)

under the shitposting is a real transparency mechanism. read it once, then go back to laughing.

THE PREMISE

Saylor crowned himself king of leveraged bitcoin and never stops posting. $SAYLOR is the parody that burns itself every time the king bleeds. Dumb on purpose. Mechanically real anyway.

~60% LOCKED

Real, on-chain: 55% supply timelocked + 5% founder lock (6-mo) = ~60% locked, plus 3% founder-provided LP on Meteora. The founder holds 15% treasury + 10% liquid (disclosed), and 12% is genuine community float held by others. Every lock is verifiable below.

A JOKE WITH RECEIPTS

Every red MSTR day and every confirmed BTC sale burns treasury $SAYLOR. Every single burn is a public transaction. The chart is a mood ring; the mood is fewer coins.

>be the most famous bitcoin bull alive

>turn a software company into a leveraged BTC bet

>post through every single drawdown, crown yourself king

>declare the 4-year cycle dead, christen it the "SaylorCycle"

>then quietly sell 3,588 coins to make the dividend

>anon accumulates the abandoned $SAYLOR token

>instead of dumping, LOCK/VEST 60% in public

>points a burn engine at the king's worst days

>mfw the cope became a coin with a lock and a receipt

PERKS OF THE COURT

why hold? status and perks — never yield, never a dividend, never a promise. funded by a disclosed 10,000,000 $SAYLOR (1% of supply) treasury budget, spent in public txs.

DUKE OF DEFLATIONburn-council voice + holder-only dropsserious bag

HOLDER TIERS

verify your wallet in Discord, receive your title. bigger bag, better seat at court: roles, channels, first looks. status, not salary.

BURN MILESTONES

every time total-burned crosses a marker, the whole court celebrates — giveaways, custom emotes, one-off drops from the disclosed budget.

WEEKLY MEME BOUNTIES

one prompt, seven days, best shitposts get paid in $SAYLOR from the bounty pot. earn it with your hands, not your bag.

MERCH DROPS

holder-only drops and court discounts. the crown store opens to titled wallets first.

titles are wallet-verified in the Discord. sell down, and the court demotes you — the ledger doesn't lie.

CLAIM YOUR TITLE

perks are discretionary, non-financial, and can change — see disclaimer.

Full disclosure: total supply is 1,000,000,000. ~60% is locked on-chain (55% supply timelocked + 5% founder lock, public dates), plus 3% founder-provided Meteora liquidity (4% swap fee; fee split 25% treasury / 75% founder — full detail on the transparency page). THE COPE ENGINE

supply only moves one direction — down. his pain, our deflation. every burn a public tx.

AUDIT IN PROGRESS — the burn contract routes no real funds until an independent audit ships (see roadmap). until then, burns run manually from the treasury, posted publicly.

three triggers

triggerburnsource
MSTR red 0–3%250,000treasury
MSTR red 3–7%500,000treasury
MSTR red 7%+1,000,000treasury
Confirmed BTC sale2,000,000treasury
Merch + LP feesbuybackcirculating
Green day, no sale0 — the king eats good. engine sleeps.—
$--
MSTR last close
0
total $SAYLOR burned
pending launch
next check
how each trigger works (the full mechanics)

1 · MSTR closes red (automated keeper). A keeper bot reads MSTR's official daily close, computes the % move, and if it's red, submits a burn sized to the drop. The price arrives as a signed attestation the contract verifies — the keeper cannot fake a number, and a green day burns nothing.

2 · Confirmed BTC sale (watcher → signer). A watcher monitors SEC EDGAR filings + official disclosures. Filings are ground truth; social chatter is early-warning only and can never trigger a burn. On a CONFIRMED filing the treasury signer verifies and fires the same day. Rumors never burn.

3 · Buyback & burn (perpetual). Merch profits + 25% of LP swap fees buy $SAYLOR on the open market and burn it — pulling from circulating supply, working even in a flat market. Buy a hat → burn a coin, forever.

Guardrails. Hard daily cap (~1.5M) enforces a 6+ month treasury runway · locked supply and LP principal are never touched · the signer can pause the engine · trigger 2 always requires a human signature · 2-of-3 multisig upgrade on the roadmap.

Burns reduce the supply count only — they do not create, protect, or promise any value or price outcome.

THE SAYLORCYCLE

the thesis $SAYLOR exists to troll: the 4-year bitcoin cycle is dead, "winter isn't coming," and we've entered a decade-long institutional gold rush. coined by Brad Mills.

In the SaylorCycle, Bitcoin stops trading in halving-driven 4-year waves and enters a permanent accumulation phase — corporate treasuries, ETFs, and nation-states hoovering up supply faster than it's mined. Saylor himself declared the 4-year cycle dead in April 2026. Winter, allegedly, isn't coming.

…and then the king sold.

CONFIRMED, per Strategy's own disclosure: the company sold 3,588 BTC (Jun 29 – Jul 5, 2026, avg ~$60k) to fund preferred-stock dividends — cutting holdings to 843,775 BTC. The man whose entire brand was "never sell"… sold. That is exactly the Cope Engine's Trigger 2. He types, he sells, we burn.

Public disclosure — sources: sale summary · CoinDesk. Verify before you trust.

"SaylorCycle" is a thesis by Brad Mills / @bradmillscan. The chart above is our own original illustration, not his. $SAYLOR is an unaffiliated parody.

LIVE CHART

real-time, straight from dexscreener. don't trust the vibes, trust the candles.

THE ROADMAP

no fake partnerships, no "Q4 metaverse." just the actual sequence.

PHASE 0 — LOCK & LAUNCH

supply timelock + founder vest (public tx) · Meteora LP · founder-controlled treasury live · authorities revoked · Dexscreener CTO claim · CA reveal. Every lock goes on-chain BEFORE any "locked" claim is made public.

PHASE 1 — COMMUNITY

Telegram + Discord live with verification gates · anti-scam bots 24/7 · holder tiers + meme bounties begin · daily X cadence · merch store online · manual treasury burns begin.

PHASE 2 — AUDIT & COPE ENGINE

Independent professional audit of the burn contract → fix + re-review → devnet soak with negative tests → THEN deploy to mainnet and route treasury through it. No real funds in the contract until this ships. Treasury upgrades to a 2-of-3 multisig; burns stay manual until the audit clears.

PHASE 3 — DEFLATION ON AUTOPILOT

Keeper + watcher fully automated · live burn dashboard · buyback-burn from merch + LP fees compounding · community input on burn-tier tweaks. cope becomes deflation, forever.

HOW 2 COPE (BUY)

1. GET A WALLET

Phantom or Solflare. Fund with SOL.

2. COPY THE CA

Only ever trust the address on this page. Anyone DMing you a different one is scamming you.

3. SWAP ON JUPITER

The buy button below pre-fills the pair. Click, swap SOL → $SAYLOR, done.

4. TAKE YOUR SEAT AT COURT

Verify your wallet in Discord, claim your title. The burns are the show, not a promise.

PARODY / DISCLAIMER — read this, it matters. $SAYLOR is a community-run PARODY memecoin made for entertainment and satire. It is NOT affiliated with, endorsed by, or connected to Michael Saylor, Strategy Inc. / MicroStrategy, or MSTR in any way. All names, likenesses, and references are used for parody and commentary. The "cope king" character is a stylized cartoon meme illustration, not a real photograph or portrait of any person. Third-party meme characters depicted in artwork (e.g. Doge, Pepe) are cultural references; no affiliation with any project or rights holder is implied. $SAYLOR is NOT an investment, security, or financial product, carries no expectation of profit, and confers no ownership or claim on any entity or company. Token burns reduce the supply count only; they do not create, protect, or promise any value or price outcome. Community perks (tiers, bounties, merch, milestone rewards) are discretionary, non-financial benefits funded from the disclosed treasury budget; they are not yield, dividends, or compensation, and may change or end at any time. Full transparency: total supply is 1,000,000,000. ~60% is locked on-chain (55% supply timelocked + 5% founder lock), plus 3% founder-provided Meteora liquidity; the founder holds 15% treasury + 10% liquid (disclosed), and 12% is genuine community float held by other wallets — all disclosed openly, verify on-chain via the links above. Memecoins are extremely high risk — you can lose everything. Nothing on this site is financial advice. Do your own research. By interacting with this token or site you accept full responsibility for your own decisions.
